g.title: PKU_QSP
g.text: Phenylketonuria (페닐케톤뇨증, PKU) — Integrated QSP Mechanistic Map
PAH-gene loss-of-function → hyperphenylalaninemia → LAT1/BBB amino-acid competition → cerebral monoamine deficit & neurotoxicity
Diet (Phe-restriction/medical formula) · Sapropterin (BH4 cofactor) · Pegvaliase (PEG-PAL enzyme substitution) · Investigational gene/mRNA/microbiome therapy

g.text: 4. Hepatic PAH Enzyme & BH4 Catalytic Cycle

g.text: 7. Plasma Amino-Acid Pool & BBB LAT1 Competition
